title: 11 Herbal Creams For Peptic Ulcers
description: Cinchona officinalis creams contains a compound called quinine, which is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The alkaloid cinchonine is also present in these creams, helping to reduce pain and inflammation in the stomach. Alkaloids like quinidine and cinchonidine in Cinchona officinalis creams have a soothing effect on the stomach lining, which helps to heal peptic ulcers.
